hooks.command: jq -e '(.tool_input.model // "") != ""' >/dev/null || printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Agent() invocation is missing the model parameter. Read the ## Model line from the agent definition file (ai-standards/agents/*.md) and pass opus or sonnet as the model argument. See ai-standards/CLAUDE.md Agent model tiering."}}'
